name: Messiah Protocols
text: During the action phase, you may exhaust this card and spend any amount of influence to place 1 infantry from your reinforcements on a number of different planets you control equal to the influence spent.

name: Navigation Relays
text: After you activate a system, you may exhaust this card to allow your ships and units they transport to move out of systems that contain your command tokens during this tactical action.

name: Immortal II
text:
Cost 1(x2), Combat 7
 After this unit is destroyed or removed, capture this unit. DEPLOY: At the start of your turn, you may place 1 infantry on a planet you control.

name: Reality-Field Impactor
text: After you activate a system, you may choose 1 anomaly on the game board; that anomaly has no effect until the end of this tactical action.

name: Commando II
text: Units cannot use SPACE CANNON against this unit. After this unit is destroyed, place the unit on this card. At the start of your turn, place each unit that is on this card on planets that contain your space docks. 1(x2) 7;

name: Battlecruiser II
text:
Cost 2, Combat 6, Move 3, Capacity 1, AFB 5 (x2)
If the active system contains another player's units, this unit may move through systems that contain ships controlled by different other players.

name: Mirrorshard II
text:
Cost 2, Combat 6, Move 3, Capacity 1, Production 1
DEPLOY: During the agenda phase, after an outcome you voted for or predicted is resolved, place up to 1 cruiser in a system that contains your ships.

name: Modular Designs
text: Once during each of your actions, choose 1 of your units and 1 unit ability. That unit gains that unit ability with a value of 3, if applicable, until the end of that action.
notes: Not currently automated by the bot.

name: Consulate II
text:
PLANETARY SHIELD, SPACE CANNON 4
You may use this unit's SPACE CANNON against ships that are in adjacent systems. After another player activates this system, if you do not control this planet, capture up to 1 of their infantry on the game board.

name: Kaldur Arrest Field
text: When another player activates a system that contains 1 of your structures, you may capture 2 of their infantry on the game board, unless they spend 1 influence. You may spend your captured infantry as if they were trade goods.

name: Ravager II
text: After you win a space combat in this system, take up to 1 of your opponent's trade goods. 1, 7, 3, 1; ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE 5(x3)

name: Infiltration Networks
text: ACTION: Exhaust this card; for each planet that contains your coexisting units, you may destroy 1 infantry on that planet or take up to 2 trade goods or commodities from the player who controls that planet.

name: Astromantic Cloak
text:
Steel: Other players cannot look at your hand of action cards, promissory notes, or secret objectives. Other players cannot take or force you to give them your action cards, promissory notes, or secret objectives.

Star: After you commit units to a planet, you may choose for those units to coexist. When a player ends coexistence with your units on a planet, you may look at their hand of action cards, promissory notes, or secret objectives.

name: Veiled Networking
text:
Steel: During the agenda phase, when an outcome would be resolved, if you voted for or predicted another outcome, you may spend 1 token from your strategy pool to discard the agenda instead; the agenda is resolved with no effect and it is not replaced.

Star: Your blockaded units can produce ships in adjacent systems that contain your command tokens and no other player's ships. Your units cannot lose their unit abilities or text abilities.

name: Synchrony Matrix
text: At the end of your turn, you may exhaust this card to ready 1 agent or ability card in your play area.

name: Wyvern II
text: You may commit this unit to a planet as if it were a ground force. When combat ends, return it to the space area. Fighters in excess of your ships' capacity count against your fleet pool. 1(x2), 8, 2; ANTI-FIGHTER BARRAGE 9(x2)

name: Emergency Modifications
text: After a player activates a system, choose 1 unit on the game board; apply +2 to that unit's Capacity value, if it has one, until the end of this tactical action.

name: V.I.R. Training
text: During each round of combat, you may cancel 1 hit your units produced to cancel up to 1 hit your opponent's units produced. At any time, you may exhaust this card to cancel 1 hit produced against your units.
